## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss closing out the current engagement and explore potential future collaboration opportunities between Attention and fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current engagement ending late March; focus on wrapping up ongoing work and sharing learnings](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Exploring new direction: shift from blog content to programmatic SEO for features/integrations pages](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Potential for month-to-month continuation with adjusted focus on conversion-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Interest in accelerating creation of gated assets for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

## Topics

### Wrapping Up Current Engagement

  - [Export Ahrefs data to Google Sheets for Attention's future reference](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Share learnings on AirOps workflows, particularly for podcast-to-article conversion](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Continue pushing out blog articles until engagement ends](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Andrej to present 40 new topic ideas for approval, aiming to reach \~200 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### Performance Assessment

  - [Organic traffic and keywords have increased, domain rating slightly improved](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Limited conversions from blog traffic, leading to reconsideration of strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Attention evaluating ROI based on closed-won pipeline from blog conversions](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

### Exploring New Directions

  - [Shift focus from blog content to building out feature/use case pages across the website](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Examples discussed: Descript's tools section, TLDR's integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Potential to leverage programmatic SEO tactics for rapid page creation](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Attention's upcoming internal workflow builder presents opportunity for content expansion](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

### Gated Content Strategy

  - [Interest in creating more gated assets for email collection](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Discussed HubSpot's approach to templates and kits as inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Potential to use programmatic SEO to accelerate gated content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Continuation Options

  - [Possibility of month-to-month continuation after March](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Maintain current pricing despite typically higher rates for programmatic engagements](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Focus on building programmatic strategy that aligns with Attention's goals](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Andrej reminded about previously sent image examples and technical SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Attention's design team can quickly create new page templates in Figma (3-4 days turnaround)](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting early next week to dive deeper into new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [fwd.digital team to research Descript and TLDR examples for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Discuss CRO tactics, including content CTAs, lead magnets, reports, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO approach for Attention's feature pages and workflow builder use cases](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Attention to review image examples and technical SEO audit sent by Andrej](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Begin planning for potential gated content creation, including templates and kits](https://fathom.video/share/JV-2exsNcWgG2BfsPaRNXz7snE5SnLey?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
